name: Shelton Tufted Top Storage Ottoman - Gray - Threshold™: Upholstered Rectangular Furniture with Lid
description:
Add a dash of contemporary style to your existing decor with the Shelton Tufted Top Storage Ottoman from Threshold™. This versatile ottoman will look great in any room with its gorgeous upholstery and classic button-tufted detailing. Best of all, it doubles as a handy storage compartment that's accessible with just a simple lift of the seat cushion.

Overall Width: 38 inches
Overall Height: 17 inches
Overall Depth: 18 inches
Leg Width: 3 inches
Leg Height: 2.2 inches
Interior Width: 35.8 inches
Interior Height: 9.5 inches
Interior Depth: 16 inches

WARNING:
Risk of child suffocation or entrapment.
This ottoman is not intended or suitable for a toy chest and must not be used by children.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.



Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
